events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the staged arc-flash PPE is rated below the incident energy category on the equipment label and its DOC/ID tags can't verify the rating — a critical, non-compliant condition. Decision is `fail`; corrective action is to re-verify the equipment label and re-issue PPE matching or exceeding the required category before work begins.
